mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category_id AS categoryId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_desc AS productDesc, p.main_image AS mainImage, (SELECT MIN(s.sale_price) FROM mall_product_sku s WHERE s.product_id = p.id AND s.status = 1) AS salePrice
ORDER BY p.sort_num ASC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT id, category_id, product_name, product_desc, main_image, banner_images, status, sort_num, ext_json, create_time, update_time FROM mall_product WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.sql:
FROM mall_product p WHERE p.status = 1
AND p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.category_id AS categoryId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_desc AS productDesc, p.main_image AS mainImage, (SELECT MIN(s.sale_price) FROM mall_product_sku s WHERE s.product_id = p.id AND s.status = 1) AS salePrice
ORDER BY p.sort_num ASC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
